name: scan-barcode
summary: Barcode/QR scanner with OpenFoodFacts product lookup — fully key-free (LIBOU-style food scan).
postInstall: npx expo install expo-camera  (needs a dev build for the camera; permission prompt works on device)
Add the camera usage string to app.config.ts ios.infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription (tailored, not generic) — store-readiness requires it
OpenFoodFacts needs NO key. To use a different product DB later, swap src/features/scan/data/openfoodfacts.ts
Replace src/features/scan/ui/scan-screen.tsx after the Claude Design pass
